name: buca1821-marketplace
description: Personal plugin marketplace — iOS development skills, audit agents, workflow commands, and git hooks

plugins.name: claude-notifications-macos
plugins.description: macOS notifications when Claude needs your attention — fires on task completion and permission requests

plugins.name: ios-swift-skills
plugins.description: Comprehensive iOS/SwiftUI knowledge base — 12 skills covering SwiftUI, concurrency, security, networking, testing, performance, design system, CI/CD, App Store, and more

plugins.name: ios-audit-agents
plugins.description: 4 specialized iOS audit agents (architecture, code health, API freshness, UX/accessibility) with /run-audits and /performance-audit commands

plugins.name: implement-issue
plugins.description: End-to-end GitHub issue implementation workflow — read issue, plan, implement, build, create PR, respond to reviews

plugins.name: ios-git-hooks
plugins.description: Git safety hooks for iOS projects — blocks commits to main and runs pre-commit quality checks on Swift files
